title: Section 65
content: (1) No suit-- (a) for the infringement of a variety registered under this Act; or (b) relating to any right in a variety registered under this Act, shall be instituted in any court inferior to a District Court having jurisdiction to try the suit. (2) For the purposes of clauses (a) and (b) of sub-section (1), District Court having jurisdiction shall mean the District Court within the local limit of whose jurisdiction the cause of action arises.
